title: GET /api/navigation/:topicSlug/:dateKey Response
description: Response shape returned by the /api/navigation/:topicSlug/:dateKey Pages Function. Returns the previous and next published day keys for use by the DateNavigator component. Both fields are null when no adjacent days with content exist.

prev_date_key.description: YYYY-MM-DD date of the previous day that has content for this topic. Null when there is no earlier day.

next_date_key.description: YYYY-MM-DD date of the next day that has content for this topic. Null when there is no later day.
